title: Acceptance: zero-glue Work Grill end-to-end on a scratch 0.3.0 Instance
description: Run the full Work Grill (grill -> PRD -> issues) on a scratch 0.3.0 Instance after EXEC-033. Every artifact lands in the framework structure conformant to schema, with zero translation language anywhere in the run. This is PRD-005's acceptance test.
acceptance_criteria: the full Work Grill (grill -> PRD -> issues) runs end-to-end on a scratch 0.3.0 Instance
every artifact lands in the framework structure conformant to schema
zero translation language anywhere in the run
notes: Kept from sprint 1, re-pointed to PRD-005 for sprint 2. HITL — the grill requires the user. Deferred from sprint 2 (Brooks, 2026-06-08): never started; returned to backlog.json with the acceptance flag preserved. S2-10 remains in sprint_2.json not_shipped as the planned-but-deferred record.
